pickup.name: Frost-Infused Crystal
pickup.effect: Temporarily grants chill damage to fire spells

encounters.trigger: Defeating the construct triggers the opening of the heavy iron gate leading to the ritual chamber

pickup.name: Ancient Sun-Seal
pickup.effect: Increases spell casting speed and fire intensity

encounters.trigger: The death of the cultist shatters the barrier protecting the inner sanctum

pickup.name: Luminous Amulet
pickup.effect: Reveals the true form of the hidden boss

encounters.trigger: Clearing the sentinel reveals the pedestal where the boss awaits

boss.name: Void Warden
boss.victory_condition: Use the Luminous Amulet to blind the Warden, then strike with the Obsidian Flame Staff

level.objective: Purge the corruption from the Smoldering Catacombs by defeating the Void Warden

pickup.name: Sparkle Nectar
pickup.effect: Increases movement speed

encounters.trigger: Defeating the sprout releases a pollen cloud that reveals the path to the Crystal Creek.

pickup.name: Sun-Kissed Berry
pickup.effect: Restores 50 health

encounters.trigger: The newt's splash reveals a hidden bridge leading to the Elder Tree.

pickup.name: Ancient Acorn
pickup.effect: Deals massive damage to constructs

encounters.trigger: The squirrel drops a key that unlocks the gate to the Boss Arena.

boss.name: Clockwork Treant
boss.victory_condition: Use the Ancient Acorn to disable the Treant's gears before landing the final blow.

level.objective: Retrieve the Grove's stolen giggle essence from the malfunctioning Clockwork Treant.

pickup.name: Vial of Holy Oil
pickup.effect: Coats weapon for extra fire damage

encounters.trigger: Defeating the Stalker unlocks the heavy iron gate to the Nave

pickup.name: Fragment of the Sun Stone
pickup.effect: Emits blinding light

encounters.trigger: Slaying the Knight shatters the seal on the Altar stairs

pickup.name: Ancient Amulet of Warding
pickup.effect: Grants immunity to abyssal energy

encounters.trigger: Banishing the Horror causes the barrier to the High Altar to drop

boss.name: Arch-Heretic Malakor
boss.victory_condition: Channel the Amulet to strip his shield before delivering the final blow

level.objective: Purge the cathedral of the lingering darkness and defeat the Arch-Heretic

level.setting: The Whispering Archive, a library built inside a shifting nebula.

encounters.hazard: Shifting floor tiles that drop players into the void

pickup.name: Lens of Clarity
pickup.effect: Reveals hidden mechanisms

encounters.trigger: Defeating the Sentinel opens the sealed library archives

encounters.hazard: Cloud of poisonous vapor obscuring vision

pickup.name: Liquid Moonlight
pickup.effect: Temporarily stuns shadow entities

encounters.trigger: Clearing the corridor activates the gate to the inner sanctum

encounters.hazard: Papercuts that cause bleed damage over time

pickup.name: Chronos Key
pickup.effect: Allows access to the boss's temporal pocket

encounters.trigger: Construct destruction reveals the Chronos Key used to unlock the boss chamber

boss.name: The Forgotten Librarian
boss.victory_condition: Use the Chronos Key to anchor the Librarian in time before striking with the Glimmer-Glass Dagger.

level.objective: Retrieve the Tome of Infinite Truths from the heart of the library.
level.reward: The ability to manifest temporary physical clones.

level.setting: The Whispering Glade, a serene forest bathed in soft golden twilight

pickup.name: Sun-drenched Dew
pickup.effect: Restores health and reveals hidden paths

encounters.trigger: Defeating the sapling clears the fog revealing the path to the Silver Stream

pickup.name: Moonlight Essence
pickup.effect: Increases magical potency against spirits

encounters.trigger: Calming the sprite opens the gate to the Ancient Grove

pickup.name: Crystal Seed
pickup.effect: A powerful catalyst required to harmonize the heart of the forest

encounters.trigger: Shattering the guardian's shell unlocks the central sanctum for the boss fight

boss.name: Ethereal Warden of the Glade
boss.victory_condition: Use the Crystal Seed to purify the Warden's corrupted essence

level.objective: Restore balance to the Whispering Glade by purifying its guardian.
level.reward: The title of Guardian of the Glade and the ability to command local flora.

pickup.name: Frost-Infused Oil
pickup.effect: Coats weapon to deal extra damage and slow enemies

encounters.trigger: Defeating the Sentinel opens the path to the Inner Sanctum

pickup.name: Molten Ember Core
pickup.effect: Grants heat-based explosive damage for the next strike

encounters.trigger: Slaying the commander shatters the barrier to the throne room

pickup.name: Ancient Void Keystone
pickup.effect: Unlocks the boss chamber doors

encounters.trigger: Using the keystone initiates the final confrontation with the Void King

boss.name: Void King
boss.victory_condition: Channel the Keystone energy into the axe to execute a killing blow

level.objective: Topple the Void King and reclaim the realm
level.reward: The Crown of Eternity and eternal dominion

level.setting: a decaying, mist-shrouded necropolis under a blood moon

encounters.hazard: Grasping skeletal hands from the soil

pickup.name: Vial of Soul-Ash
pickup.effect: Temporarily grants necrotic burn damage

encounters.trigger: Defeating the warden activates the floating lanterns leading to the catacombs

encounters.hazard: Dense fog obscuring line of sight

pickup.name: Silver Chime of Binding
pickup.effect: Stuns spectral entities

encounters.trigger: Clearing the crypt triggers the ancient mechanism to open the Inner Sanctum

pickup.name: Orb of Eternal Respite
pickup.effect: Cleanses the corruption of the boss encounter

encounters.trigger: Banishing the traitor releases the seal on the final boss's resting place

boss.name: Lich King Aethelred
boss.victory_condition: Use the Orb of Eternal Respite to shatter the Lich's phylactery and drain his remaining soul energy

level.objective: Purify the desecrated necropolis and stop the Lich King from raising an undead army

level.setting: a desolate, frost-bitten tundra beneath a dying sun

encounters.hazard: biting sub-zero winds that drain health over time

pickup.name: Ancient Fire Salts
pickup.effect: coats ammunition in searing magical heat

encounters.trigger: Slaying the stalker reveals a path to the Sunken Cript

enemy.name: Rime-Crusted Revenant
enemy.weakness: Ancient Fire Salts applied to bow

encounters.hazard: shattering floor tiles that collapse underfoot

pickup.name: Essence of Solar Flare
pickup.effect: potent alchemical explosive capable of melting god-forged ice

encounters.trigger: Activating the crypt altar triggers a spectral gate to the Spire

pickup.name: Talisman of Radiance
pickup.effect: strips boss invulnerability barriers

encounters.trigger: Defeating the sentinel clears the obstruction to the inner throne

boss.name: Frost-God Ymirin
boss.victory_condition: Strike the boss with the Essence of Solar Flare while shielded by the Talisman of Radiance

level.objective: Shatter the eternal winter by defeating the Frost-God
level.reward: The legendary Bow of the Morning Star

level.setting: A decaying deep-space research vessel drifting near a collapsing star

pickup.name: Cryogenic Coolant Canister
pickup.effect: Deploys a localized freeze field to shatter brittle armor

encounters.trigger: Destroying the bot causes an overload that unlocks the bulkhead to the Cryo-Storage zone

encounters.hazard: Flickering emergency strobe lights causing disorientation

pickup.name: Voltage Overload Fuse
pickup.effect: Electrifies metallic conduits to stun advanced mechanical enemies

encounters.trigger: Burning the biomass reveals a hidden maintenance crawlspace leading to the Reactor Core

pickup.name: Master Override Keycard
pickup.effect: Grants access to the main reactor lockdown protocols

encounters.trigger: Disabling the sentinel provides the clearance needed to enter the Bridge where the boss resides

boss.name: The Rogue AI mainframe
boss.victory_condition: Insert the Keycard into the terminal to force a system reboot

level.objective: Stabilize the ship's reactor before the star consumes the vessel
level.reward: The ship's automated escape pod is unlocked

level.setting: An abandoned research station drifting in the void of a dying nebula.

encounters.hazard: Periodic oxygen leaks causing temporal distortion

pickup.name: Stasis Battery
pickup.effect: Freezes robotic enemies in place for 5 seconds

encounters.trigger: Defeating the husk triggers the opening of the heavy bulkhead to the Laboratory.

encounters.hazard: Flickering emergency strobe lights blinding the player

pickup.name: Temporal Anchor
pickup.effect: Stabilizes the boss room environment and negates boss shielding

encounters.trigger: Destroying the sentinel grants the security clearance needed for the Reactor Core.

encounters.hazard: Corrosive radiation leaking from floor conduits

pickup.name: Chronos Key
pickup.effect: Allows interaction with the master console to initiate boss fight

encounters.trigger: Retrieving the key reveals the central mainframe where the entity resides.

boss.name: The Singularity Construct
boss.victory_condition: Successfully stabilize the singularity before it consumes the station.

level.objective: Prevent the research station from collapsing into a black hole.
level.reward: The ability to manipulate local time flows at will.

level.setting: A decaying, destabilized space station caught in a gravitational anomaly

encounters.hazard: Electrical arcs jumping across the floor

pickup.name: Magnetic Polarizer Module
pickup.effect: Allows the user to repel incoming projectile fire

encounters.trigger: Destroying the drone triggers the emergency blast doors to open to the docking bay

pickup.name: Thermal Superconductor Core
pickup.effect: Temporarily grants explosive elemental damage to Ionic Discharge Gauntlet

encounters.trigger: Securing the bay activates the freight lift to the command deck

encounters.hazard: Oxygen depletion causing rapid health drain

pickup.name: Void Anchor Key
pickup.effect: Stabilizes reality in a localized zone

encounters.trigger: Defeating the soldier causes the station's AI to initiate the final lockdown override

boss.name: Singularity Abomination
boss.victory_condition: Use the Void Anchor Key to collapse the boss into a singularity

level.objective: Navigate the collapsing station and neutralize the singularity before the station drifts into a star
level.reward: The Core of the Station's Reality Drive

level.setting: An abandoned orbital research station drifting through a nebula

pickup.name: Conductive Fluid Canister
pickup.effect: Increases electrical conductivity of environmental surfaces

encounters.trigger: Deactivating the drone opens the blast doors to the Laboratory sector

pickup.name: Data Core Fragment
pickup.effect: Reveals structural vulnerabilities in heavy containment doors

encounters.trigger: Downloading the data clears the lock on the Research Command bridge

pickup.name: Master Override Key
pickup.effect: Disables the central cooling systems of the station boss

encounters.trigger: Overriding the bridge terminal unlocks the main Reactor core chamber

boss.name: Omega-Class Processing Unit
boss.victory_condition: Use the Override Key to force a core shutdown while the unit is exposed

level.objective: Restore power to the station's escape vessel

level.setting: derelict bio-engineering space station drifting in deep space

pickup.name: thermal flare
pickup.effect: reveals cloaked enemies and melts synth-flesh

encounters.trigger: destroying the drone unlocks the airlock to the laboratory corridor

pickup.name: hacking interface module
pickup.effect: bypasses electromagnetic locking mechanisms on heavy bulkheads

encounters.trigger: defeating the assassin allows access to the central server core control room

pickup.name: hyper-frequency disruptor
pickup.effect: strips personal energy shields from targets

encounters.trigger: shutting down the sentry disables the gravitational inhibitors guarding the boss arena

boss.name: The Gestalt AI core
boss.victory_condition: successfully purge the core mainframe while defending against corrupted constructs

level.objective: infiltrate the station and purge the rogue AI before it signals the nearby fleet
level.reward: ascension to shadow master rank and ancient neural archives

level.setting: An abandoned orbital biolab drifting in deep space.

pickup.name: Experimental Solvent
pickup.effect: Increases acid potency against metallic surfaces

encounters.trigger: Destroying the bot reveals a path to the Engineering Deck

pickup.name: Super-Coolant Canister
pickup.effect: Allows the user to freeze molten core reactors

encounters.trigger: Eliminating the mutant unlocks the emergency elevator to the Observation Dome

pickup.name: Nullifier Catalyst
pickup.effect: Neutralizes unstable energy shields

encounters.trigger: Defeating the parasite disables the containment field protecting the Central Core

boss.name: The Sentient Singularity
boss.victory_condition: Use the Nullifier Catalyst to destabilize the Singularity before it detonates the station

level.objective: Purge the station of the rogue biological entities and safely shut down the Central Core.
level.reward: The Station Master's command override codes and safe transit home.

pickup.name: Bubble Gum Pellets
pickup.effect: Increases projectile stickiness

encounters.trigger: Defeating the bot activates the bridge to the main hall.

pickup.name: Super-Sized Battery
pickup.effect: Adds electrical charge to ammunition

encounters.trigger: Disabling the droid unlocks the lift to the catwalks.

pickup.name: High-Voltage Capacitor
pickup.effect: Essential for powering the final boss's off-switch

encounters.trigger: Subduing the golem opens the blast doors to the central dance floor.

boss.name: DJ Mega-Tron
boss.victory_condition: Overload the DJ booth with the High-Voltage Capacitor to stop the music.

level.objective: Shut down the station's incessant dance party protocol.

level.setting: An ancient, floating crystal garden orbiting a dying blue star

pickup.name: Gravity Anchor
pickup.effect: Stabilizes local gravitational fields

encounters.trigger: Destroying the drone releases a pulse that unlocks the Vault of Echoes.

pickup.name: Resonant Tuning Fork
pickup.effect: Amplifies geomantic vibrations against solid structures

encounters.trigger: Defeating the construct causes the vault floor to crumble, revealing the path to the Core.

pickup.name: Star-Core Shard
pickup.effect: Provides absolute armor against the Guardian's decay

encounters.trigger: The Sentinel's collapse triggers the activation of the final Boss monolith.

boss.name: Apex Orbital Guardian
boss.victory_condition: Insert the Star-Core Shard into the Guardian's chest chassis to collapse its energy matrix.

level.objective: Restore balance to the celestial garden by calming the rogue Guardian.
level.reward: Control over the garden's orbital path and eternal serenity.
